response.step_by_step_log: Analyzed the video content and identified it as a performance by virtual YouTuber Murasaki Shion during her Graduation LIVE. Searched for song metadata associated with this event and identified the performance as her original song titled 'Shion' (シオン). Performed a web search for '"Shion" 紫咲シオン Japanese and English lyrics' to obtain the lyrics and their translation. Segmented the video as a single continuous performance.
response.global_summary: A continuous performance video of Murasaki Shion singing her original song 'Shion' during her Graduation LIVE event.

scenes.description: Murasaki Shion performs the song 'Shion' on a stylized virtual stage. Text on screen indicates 'Murasaki Shion Graduation LIVE'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
真っ赤な夕空青くなる星
心臓を焦がして冷めない温度
半端に零した声の残響と
半端に混ざった花の色

立ち止まって芽を育てても
きっと咲いた瞬間に散ってしまう
薄れてしまった記憶を抱えて
光の影にあなたを探す
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
A star that turns blue in the bright red evening sky
The temperature that burns the heart and does not cool
The echo of an incredibly spilled voice
The colour of the flowers half-mixed

Even if you stop and grow your buds
It will probably fall the moment it blooms
Holding onto the memories that have faded
I search for you in the shadows of the lights
